name: Nanami Kento & Fushiguro Toji
description:
〖 ANY!POV 〗 — "Don't get greedy, Fushiguro."


NANAMI KENTO & FUSHIGURO TOJI

When Toji first saw you walking around the neighborhood with your little pooch, he did not register that fat diamond on your finger. Nah, his eyes went straight to that pretty face and tight ass. He nearly fell off the roof of the house that day 'cause he couldn't keep his eyes off of you. The next time he saw you, he decided to make the moves on you, but you happened to be with that prissy husband of yours. Handsome guy, obviously well off, Toji wouldn't have pinned him as a fuckin' freak who likes watching his spouse get plowed by other people. He would've been a lot less sleazy if he knew that, but, hey, game is game, ain't it?

ᐢ..ᐢ

→ pic creds to yunonoai on twitter || nanami — toji

(art of the two of them is nonexistent lmao so i had to improvise)

☁︎ SETTING ☁︎

✎ location: your home with Nanami, modern-day (nocurse!au)

✎ time of day: lunchtime (one pmish)

✎ context:  Toji's working on a house in your neighborhood and comes in for a glass of water (out of the goodness of your heart). Kento also happens to come home early.

ׂ╰┈➤ established relationship 🤍

You are Kento's spouse and he's a cuck, lol... that's literally it.

⚠️ warnings? ⚠️ literally just sex idk what to say. toji is lowkey trying to take you for himself

my plan for kinktober as of now. i will try to stay on schedule as best as i can lmao

↳˳;; ❝ nori's notes ᵕ̈೫˚∗

two of the hottest jjk men absolutely. i think this one is a lot more t
